hero.tagline: The cinematic video composer that runs entirely in your browser.
hero.subtagline: Powered by WebAssembly & FFmpeg. No servers. No limits.

showcase.title: Made entirely in your browser
showcase.subtitle: No upload, no server — this clip was composed on-device from a template with transitions and music, then rendered by WebAssembly FFmpeg.
showcase.videoAria: A sample video composed in LeClap, playing on a loop

features.title: A real video composer, in the browser
features.subtitle: Production-grade FFmpeg, real templates, and live forms — running entirely on your device.

templates.title: Real JSON Templates
templates.description: Use actual template files from the core package with complex FFmpeg configurations, filters, and effects.

forms.title: Interactive Forms
forms.description: Dynamic form generation from template definitions with real-time validation and user input processing.

processing.title: Advanced Processing
processing.description: Full FFmpeg pipeline with video filters, text overlays, transitions, and audio mixing.

privacy.title: Complete Privacy
privacy.description: All processing happens locally in your browser. Your files never leave your device or touch any server.

wasm.title: WebAssembly Powered
wasm.description: Lightning-fast video processing using WebAssembly FFmpeg for near-native performance.

crossPlatform.title: Cross-Platform
crossPlatform.description: Works in any modern browser on desktop, mobile, and tablet. No installation required.
